name: part_004
file: tmp_hololive English -Promise- 2nd Anniversary Concert： Promise 2 You 【#Promise2U】 [9hMVpcDYS-0]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_004.webm

scenes.description: The members of hololive English -Promise- appear in a bar setting for an MC segment.

subtitles.original: ...よう 飛び立つ今
subtitles.english: ...to fly away now

subtitles.original: X-encounter
subtitles.english: X-encounter

subtitles.original: 無性に振り返る 自分の居場所探して
subtitles.english: Recklessly looking back, searching for my place

subtitles.original: 後悔になぞらえた もろい生 蝕む夜にいた
subtitles.english: Tracing my regrets, I was in a night that erodes my fragile life

subtitles.original: 不器用に風に揺れて 僕はまだ弱いままで
subtitles.english: Clumsily swaying in the wind, I am still weak

subtitles.original: 迷って壊れては そうやって続く世界へ
subtitles.english: Lost and broken, towards the world that continues like that

subtitles.original: たった一つ見つけたら 瞬く星を描き進め
subtitles.english: If you find just one thing, keep drawing the twinkling stars as you move forward

subtitles.original: 闇から覗いた光 手を伸ばして さあ行こう
subtitles.english: The light peeking from the darkness, reach out your hand and let's go

subtitles.original: 走り出したこの思い ほら心の星が導いて
subtitles.english: This feeling that started running, look, the star in my heart is leading the way

subtitles.original: 染み付いてる言えない傷を この翼で
subtitles.english: The unerasable scars that have set in, with these wings

subtitles.original: 運び出せ Brave...
subtitles.english: Carry them out, Brave...

subtitles.original: I keep holding on 雲を切り 形のない涙も蹴散らして
subtitles.english: I keep holding on, cutting through the clouds, scattering even the shapeless tears

subtitles.original: 凛とした目に宿る灯火を 曇らせはしない
subtitles.english: The light dwelling in your dignified eyes, I will not let it cloud over

subtitles.original: 君はそのままでいて
subtitles.english: Stay just as you are

subtitles.original: 向かい風に逆らい いざ羽広げ目指そう 僕ら果てる日まで
subtitles.english: Defying the headwind, now spread your wings and aim for it, until the day we perish

subtitles.original: 共にかけて行こう X-encounter
subtitles.english: Let's run together, X-encounter

subtitles.original: 誰のせいでもない涙 誇りにして さあ行こう
subtitles.english: The tears that are no one's fault, take pride in them and let's go

subtitles.original: 走り出す始まりへ きっと生まれる前から決まっていた
subtitles.english: Running towards the beginning, it was surely decided since before I was born

subtitles.original: 羽を揺らし強く地を蹴って 君の元へ
subtitles.english: Shaking my wings and kicking the ground hard, to where you are

subtitles.original: 羽ばたけ Brave...
subtitles.english: Fly away, Brave...

subtitles.original: I keep holding on 幾千の後悔の後に息吹く鼓動
subtitles.english: I keep holding on, the heartbeat that breaths after thousands of regrets

subtitles.original: この一瞬が永遠へ変わる 手を繋ぎそして世界を見に行こう
subtitles.english: This moment turns into eternity, hold hands and let's go see the world

subtitles.original: 皮肉にも僕たちは 抗いより潜り抜け知るんだろう
subtitles.english: Ironically, we will probably know by slipping through rather than resisting

subtitles.original: 生存の意味を 真実へと駆けて行こう
subtitles.english: The meaning of existence, let's run towards the truth

subtitles.original: 遠回り それは幸福への景色にも
subtitles.english: A detour, even that becomes a scenery towards happiness

subtitles.original: 愛を持てた時に 世界はまた生まれ変わる
subtitles.english: When you can have love, the world will be born again

subtitles.original: （歓声）
subtitles.english: (Cheering)

subtitles.original: Thank you so much for watching the anniversary live!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for watching the anniversary live!
